name: Groiners
lead: Exercise for thigh, hip muscles and core muscles

instructions.starting position: Get into the push-up position with your hands directly under your shoulders.
instructions.execution: Keeping your back flat, step one foot all the way up next to your hand or as close as you can get. You can allow the opposite knee to bend slightly while you lean into the stretch. Hold the stretch for the desired length of time and then repeat with the opposite leg.
